content: Top rejection reasons (MS 365 Dev Blog 'Top 5 AppSource validation errors' series + submission guide 'top five common errors = 80% of rejections'): (1) missing/invalid Terms of Use link, (2) missing/invalid Privacy Policy link, (3) missing/insufficient reviewer testing instructions in Notes for Certification, (4) undisclosed service/account dependencies in listing description, (5) undisclosed additional-purchase charges. Also: ProviderName mismatch vs Publisher, unclear first-run experience, missing sign-in/out UI for external accounts.
